## Add [skill-name] skill

### Description

<!-- Briefly describe what this skill does and why it's useful. -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Skill placed in `registry/community/<name>/SKILL.md`
- [ ] Valid YAML frontmatter with all required fields (`name`, `version`, `description`, `author`, `namespace`, `category`, `tags`)
- [ ] `namespace` set to `community`
- [ ] Category is one of: `information`, `developer-tools`, `communication`, `productivity`, `devops`, `media`, `security`, `creative`
- [ ] Description is under 200 characters
- [ ] Markdown body has usage instructions written in 2nd person
- [ ] Examples section included
- [ ] Constraints section included
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in the file
- [ ] Ran `npm run validate` and it passes
